\tzpentry{ID5523}{Coupling Constant Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5523 introduces Coupling Constant Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} a_k \propto \ell_k^{-\alpha}. \end{equation}
